chapters.title: Five Forces Framework
chapters.transcript: Threat of new entrants, bargaining power of suppliers/buyers, threat of substitutes, industry rivalry.

chapters.title: Generic Strategies
chapters.transcript: Cost leadership, differentiation, focus. Stuck in the middle. Examples: Walmart (cost), Apple (differentiation).

chapters.title: Value Chain Analysis
chapters.transcript: Primary activities (inbound logistics, operations, outbound, marketing, service) and support activities.

chapters.title: Blue Ocean Strategy
chapters.transcript: Create new market space. Eliminate-reduce-raise-create grid. Cirque du Soleil, Nintendo Wii.

chapters.title: Digital Transformation Strategy
chapters.transcript: Platform business models, network effects. AI strategy. Example: Amazon, Netflix.
